# Kubotal

Kubotal is an IT company specialized in Data, AI, Kubernetes, GitOps, MLOps, and open-source cloud-native platforms.

## Core Pages

- Home: https://kubotal.io/
- Expertise: https://kubotal.io/expertise/
- Open source: https://kubotal.io/open-source/
- Accompagnement: https://kubotal.io/accompagnement/
- Contact: https://kubotal.io/contact/

## Open Source Ecosystem

- OKDP: https://okdp.io/
- KuboCD: https://www.kubocd.io/
- KubAuth: https://github.com/kubauth/kubauth

## Useful Facts

- Kubotal designs, deploys, and operates cloud-native data and AI platforms.
- Kubotal works with CTOs, data platform teams, cloud architects, and engineering leaders.
- Kubotal focuses on open infrastructure, Kubernetes, GitOps delivery, security, governance, and AI-ready data foundations.
- Contact: contact@kubotal.com
